completion_promises.criterion_text: build_stage_log_recorder(sqlite_pool) returns a StageLogRecorder Protocol implementation.
completion_promises.evidence: Created src/forge/cli/_serve_deps_stage_log.py with build_stage_log_recorder(sqlite_pool: _StageLogWriter) -> StageLogRecorder. The factory returns _AutobuildStageLogRecorder which exposes the exact record_running(build_id, feature_id, stage, details_json) -> None method declared on the Protocol in forge.pipeline.dispatchers.autobuild_async. Verified via isinstance(recorder, StageLogRecorder) since the Protocol is @runtime_checkable. Tests: TestFactoryReturnsProtocolImplementation::test_factory_returns_object_with_record_running_method and ::test_factory_returns_runtime_checkable_protocol_implementation both pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A round-trip test (write then read on the same pool) observes the recorded transition.
completion_promises.evidence: TestRoundTripWriteThenRead::test_record_running_then_read_observes_row constructs a real SqliteLifecyclePersistence facade against a freshly-migrated SQLite database (via connect_writer + migrations.apply_at_boot in tmp_path), seeds a builds row, calls recorder.record_running(...) with the dispatcher's payload shape, then calls persistence.read_stages(build_id) on the same pool and asserts that exactly one StageLogEntry is observed with build_id, stage_label=AUTOBUILD, target_kind='subagent', target_identifier=feature_id, status='PASSED', and details preserving correlation_id/subagent/task_id/feature_id plus the lifecycle_state='running' marker. The schema's CHECK constraint on stage_log.status only allows {PASSED, FAILED, GATED, SKIPPED}, so the Protocol's documented 'running' marker lives on details_json[lifecycle_state] (documented in AUTOBUILD_RUNNING_STATUS / AUTOBUILD_LIFECYCLE_STATE_KEY constants). Test passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Ran `python -m ruff check src/forge/cli/_serve_deps_stage_log.py tests/cli/test_serve_deps_stage_log.py` — output: 'All checks passed!'. Code uses black-compatible formatting, max line length 88, snake_case names, full type hints, docstrings on every public symbol. Also confirmed no regression in the related existing suites: pytest tests/forge/test_lifecycle_persistence.py tests/forge/test_dispatch_autobuild_async.py -q -> 87 passed.
